overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The scene features towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, palm trees lining the street, and moderate vehicle traffic on multi-lane roads beneath a massive overhead transit structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial boulevard with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past illuminated storefronts and palm trees

entered.detail: tall palm trees with thick trunks lining the left sidewalk
large illuminated billboard displaying 'EL GUAPO' text with stylized skull graphic
cluster of colorful holographic advertisements on building facades including red and yellow signage
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows forming the city skyline

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide neon-lit boulevard lined with palm trees on the left. The El Guapo billboard dominates the right side while colorful holographic advertisements cover the buildings ahead. The street is moderately busy with vehicles and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed urban street with tall building facade

events.description: moving past building corner into darker, more enclosed street section with reduced sky visibility
flying vehicle passes overhead between the tall buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along a darker sidewalk with a tall building wall on the left side

entered.detail: tall dark building with vertical architectural lines and illuminated ground-level windows

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a darker, more enclosed street as the character passes a building corner. The palm trees and El Guapo sign disappear behind, replaced by a tall building facade on the left. A flying vehicle passes overhead between the skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza beneath massive overhead transit arch

events.description: emerging from enclosed street into open plaza with massive overhead arch structure becoming visible
orbital air corporate sign becomes visible in the upper left area of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza area with increasing pedestrian density and heavy neon signage overhead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing a red hat walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: massive curved transit structure spanning across the street between skyscrapers with illuminated underside
green neon corporate signage for Orbital Air visible high on the left building
tall vertical billboard with yellow triangular logo and 'TRUFORM' text

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wide plaza dominated by a massive overhead transit arch spanning between skyscrapers. The Orbital Air sign appears in the upper left as the character continues forward. Pedestrian density increases, and the TruForm billboard becomes a focal point ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant neon metropolis that shifts from a wide, palm-lined boulevard into a dense urban canyon before opening into a massive transit plaza. It begins by tracking a character along a bright street dominated by the El Guapo billboard and colorful holographic advertisements. As the character rounds a building corner, the open vista narrows into a darker, enclosed street where the palm trees vanish behind a towering facade and a flying vehicle glides overhead between skyscrapers. The scene then expands as the camera emerges into a wide plaza beneath a colossal overhead transit arch spanning the skyline. Finally, the view opens further to reveal the Orbital Air sign and a growing crowd of pedestrians moving toward a prominent TruForm billboard.
